title: optiLW
description: optimized pack for Low End PCs and Laptops.
body:
! Discord Link is for RUS community only !

OptiLW is optimized pack for Low End PCs and Laptops with addition of QoL mods almost without touching Vanila Experience.

Mods List:

- Auth Me - Session renewer
- Auudio - Custom music in background
- Blur - Blur in Menus
- Cloth Config - Config Screens API
- DashLoader - Launch speed optimizer
- Dynamic FPS - Dynamic FPS adjuster for not spending resources while in background
- Fabric API - API for 99% of Fabric Mods.
- Fabric Language Kotlin - Allows Kotlin Mods to work
- Indium - Indigo-based Sodium addon to provide support for the Fabric Rendering API
- Iris - Shaders mod
- LazyDFU - optimizes DataFixerUpper.
- memory Leak Fix - fixes memory leaks
- OptiGUI - replacement for OptiFine custom GUIs.
- Reese's Sodium Options - Recommended Sodium Options Menu Look
- Sodium - Overall Minecraft optimization mod.
- Sodium Extra - Extra features for Sodium.
- spark - performance profiling mod.
- Starlight - Phosphor-compactible Lighting Engine.
